about.title: About Me
about.p1intro: Hello! I'm Kristina, the founder of Chrisi Cake.
about.p1: For 10 years, the world of pastry has been my home. What started as a passion has grown into my profession. Originally from Ukraine, I now live in Bern, where I share my love of baking with my customers.
about.p2: For me, a cake is far more than just a dessert — it is a canvas for creativity. I love experimenting with unusual ingredients and developing special flavour combinations you won't find on every corner. My goal is not only to create visually stunning works of art, but to deliver a little surprise with every bite.
about.p3: In my work I combine artisanal precision with a modern, creative touch. I look forward to bringing your next sweet project to life together with you!

prices.title: Prices
prices.subtitle: Pricing
prices.intro: Prices for my cakes vary depending on weight, design complexity and choice of ingredients.

items.label: Extra decorations
items.desc: Edible photos, fresh flowers, cake toppers

items.label: Individual quote
items.desc: Since every cake is unique, I'm happy to create a personal quote

prices.twintNote: I work exclusively with prepayment. After order confirmation, a deposit of 30 CHF is due via Twint. The remaining balance is paid at pickup.
prices.exampleNote: Prices are for the minimum cake (10 persons)
prices.calcSubtitle: Estimate the price of your cake
prices.calcMinNote: Minimum order from 8–10 persons. One cake for 10 persons is enough for that number of guests.

items.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
items.a: To guarantee the quality and freshness of my creations, I accept orders for a minimum of 10 persons.

items.q: When can I pick up my order?
items.a: Pickup is available Monday to Saturday from 18:00 – 20:00. No delivery is offered.
Please note that I do not work on Sundays and no pickups are possible on this day.

items.q: How far in advance do I need to order?
items.a: Please place your order at least 3 days before your desired date.
To reserve the date, a deposit of 30.- CHF is required by bank transfer or Twint. The remaining balance is paid at pickup.

items.q: How does the ordering process work?
items.a: Your order is only officially confirmed once you receive a personal confirmation from me (by email or phone).
No, I work exclusively with modern decoration techniques and completely avoid fondant.

items.q: Where can I pick up my order?

items.name: Sabrina K.

storage.title: Transport & Storage
storage.subtitle: Recommendations for delivery and storage
tips: If you're arriving by car, you can place the cake on the floor of the passenger seat. Make sure it stands at a 90-degree angle to the floor.
Do not hold the cake by the handle, as it is heavy and could break.
I strongly recommend always keeping the cake at a 90-degree angle.
The cake can only be stored in the refrigerator.
The cake's shelf life is 3 days (72 hours).
If the cake is multi-tiered, there are stands and food tubes under each tier, along with a wooden center axis.
